'''Kashoon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was conquered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and later freed with the help of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The [[Kashoonara]] were left to their own devices afterwards.

{{Planet-stub}}
